metadata.name: NetBird Group
metadata.description: Creates a NetBird group and can optionally attach peers and network resources.

items.name: netbird_management_url
items.title: Management URL
items.description: NetBird Management API URL. Trailing slashes are trimmed. TLS certificates must be trusted by the OpenTofu runner because the provider does not expose a skip-verification option.

items.name: netbird_tenant_account
items.title: Tenant Account
items.description: Optional tenant account ID for impersonation.

items.name: peer_names
items.title: Peer Names
items.description: Comma-separated existing NetBird peer names to attach to the group.

items.name: resource_lookups
items.title: Resource Lookups
items.description: Semicolon-separated `network_name|resource_name` entries for existing NetBird network resources to attach to the group.
